overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through Night City at night. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, large digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians. The camera follows the character through urban streets, past futuristic architecture, and across a glowing grid-patterned crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with neon-lit skyscraper

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet street toward the Night City sign, passing beneath towering glass buildings with illuminated windows

entered.detail: Multi-story modern building with grid-patterned green-lit windows dominating the left side of the street
Large illuminated cyan sign reading NIGHT CITY visible in the distance above the street
Dark wet road surface reflecting bright yellow neon lane markings
Red sports car parked along the left curb
Elevated pedestrian bridge or building connection with yellow structural lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, dominated by a massive glass building with green-tinted windows on the left. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt that reflects yellow neon lines, heading toward a glowing NIGHT CITY sign in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks, and a red sports car is parked along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with curved digital billboard facade

events.description: turns left away from the green glass building onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and a curved building featuring large digital displays

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk past illuminated advertisements and increasing numbers of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: Modern curved building facade covered with large illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements and a prominent blue humanoid figure
Tall palm trees lining the left edge of the walkway
Tall modern street lamps emitting bright white light

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the scene shifts to a pedestrian walkway alongside a striking curved building covered in massive digital billboards displaying a blue figure. Palm trees line the opposite side of the path, and the crowd density increases as the camera moves forward. The NIGHT CITY sign is now visible to the right, and a red sports car drives along the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large pedestrian crosswalk with glowing grid markings

events.description: steps onto wide pedestrian plaza with glowing yellow grid pattern crosswalk markings and illuminated WALK signal on the ground
camera follows a character in a red hoodie and pink hair crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following a character in a red hoodie, then continuing along the street past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character wearing red hoodie and pink hair walking ahead and leading the way across the crosswalk
white commercial van driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: Wide pedestrian crossing with glowing yellow grid lines and green WALK text projection on the ground
Circular speed limit sign displaying 40 mounted on a pole
White commercial van driving on the street
Red and white automated vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide pedestrian plaza featuring an illuminated crosswalk with glowing yellow grid patterns. Following a character in a red hoodie, the camera crosses the intersection where a white van drives by in the background. After crossing, the path continues past a speed limit sign and vending machines while moderate crowds of pedestrians move through the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a quiet street into a bustling pedestrian plaza. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt reflecting yellow neon lines, passing a massive green-tinted glass building and a parked red sports car toward a distant NIGHT CITY sign. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts to a crowded walkway flanked by palm trees and a curved building draped in massive digital billboards featuring a blue figure. The scene then expands into a wide pedestrian plaza where the camera follows a character in a red hoodie across a glowing yellow grid-patterned crosswalk. Finally, the movement continues past a white van and vending machines, weaving through moderate crowds under the vibrant glow of the city's architecture.
